track: rr-9 - Barbra Streisand x Eduardo Saverin
notes: Manifesto. Hook: 'Barbra Streisand / Looping in my head / Same four bars / But they hit like a movie'. Escalation: 'I didn't read the manual / I am the manual / Let's fucking go.' Detonation: 'Let's. Fucking. Go.' — three one-word chunks, each its own breath. AUDITED 2026-04-20: the two hook iterations + both thesis verses demoted to ribbons; only the final reveal ('I am the manual' #2) and the terminal word-triplet get key treatment. That gives the detonation the stage it deserves.
